name: Another Curry Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Spread the mixture out on a jelly roll pan and toast in a preheated oven set to 250 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
3. Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
4. Pulverize the spice mixture in batches using an electric spice or coffee grinder.
5. Strain the pulverized mixture through a sieve into a bowl.
6. Store the curry powder in a tightly sealed jar in a cool, dark place for up to six months.
7. Use the curry powder to season soups and stews.
